risks.description: 5/6 products lack troubleshooting symptoms; troubleshooting-package only assembles for e-shield.
2 products have empty warning corpora; warnings-follow-procedures rule cannot fire.
417 artifacts missing channel_targets; package channel-binding under-determined.
Capability assemblies (e.g. fingerprint-management) cannot resolve where capability is undeclared per product.
Per-artifact audience_scope assignments not yet authored; contextual composition relies on heuristics.
Determinism contract requires knowledge-core snapshot hash on every assembly; not yet integrated.
Cycle detection at composition time depends on graph-validation passing; currently 0 cycles, but contract must remain enforced.
15 cross-product entity-collisions + 10 terminology-collisions block cross-product capability composition.
